events.name: React Native Meetup
events.description: Join fellow developers and enthusiasts in London for an engaging evening packed with lightning talks, networking opportunities, and hands-on demos on building scalable apps with React Native.

events.name: AI Conference
events.description: Discover the forefront of artificial intelligence at this premier San Francisco conference, featuring leading researchers, tech pioneers, and interactive exhibits showcasing AI’s future impact.

events.name: Web Development Workshop
events.description: Sharpen your web development skills in this practical workshop. From front-end best practices to full-stack integration, you'll build projects and collaborate with experts from the NYC dev scene.

events.name: Blockchain Summit
events.description: Dive deep into decentralized technologies at the Blockchain Summit in Berlin. Expect thought-provoking keynotes, panel debates, and opportunities to connect with innovators in the space.

events.name: Cybersecurity Forum
events.description: Join top security professionals in Tokyo as they explore the newest tools, challenges, and strategies in cybersecurity. Learn how to safeguard systems in an increasingly connected world.

events.name: Data Science Symposium
events.description: Explore the science behind data at this dynamic symposium in Sydney. Hear from data engineers, analysts, and AI practitioners on making data-driven decisions that drive real-world impact.

events.name: Mobile App Development Expo
events.description: The Mobile App Development Expo in Toronto is your gateway to the next generation of apps. See live demos, attend development masterclasses, and meet the teams behind popular mobile products.

events.name: Cloud Computing Conference
events.description: Experience how cloud computing is shaping global infrastructure at this Dubai event. Topics range from multi-cloud strategies to scalable serverless applications in modern enterprises.

events.name: IoT Summit
events.description: Discover the potential of the Internet of Things at Singapore's leading IoT summit. From smart homes to industrial IoT, dive into talks, workshops, and real-world tech showcases.

events.name: Tech for Good Conference
events.description: Technology with a purpose. Join technologists, activists, and policy makers in Amsterdam to explore how tech can solve global issues — from climate change to digital inclusion.

events.name: Virtual Reality Expo
events.description: Step into the future at LA’s biggest VR expo. With immersive demos, hardware showcases, and talks from VR pioneers, this event is perfect for enthusiasts and professionals alike.

events.name: Sustainable Tech Summit
events.description: The Sustainable Tech Summit in Barcelona brings together green tech innovators to discuss the intersection of sustainability and innovation. Expect case studies, product showcases, and policy debates.
